## [00:00 - 01:44]

So you decided to put the work we've done so far into your own amazing coaching program. Congratulations. Coaching is such a powerful profession. It's such a powerful industry. And there's so many tears to it. Listen, I would never be, Tony would never be, or have the success we have without coaches in our lives. And I'm so proud of you. You get the opportunity to create transformation in others, whether you do it one-on-one or in groups. And we have an incredible coach to lead you through the process of turning your thoughts, your teaching topics into a reality that can help others to create your curriculum. And you're going to learn from Amanda Kaufman. Now here's what's cool about Amanda. She is not only one of our students, not only a part of one of our high-end masterminds. I've watched this woman transform lives and become an incredible coach. She is so talented. And she's worked and trained hundreds of coaches over the years that started off new or started off dabbling, but they didn't know how to get them momentum. She gets coaching on a very deep level. And we hand selected her to teach you how to create your coaching program. She knows how we do things here at Mastermind, and her approach blends perfectly with our philosophy. I know you're going to absolutely love her. And what's best is just think at one point she was sitting where you are, and now we invited her back and we trust her to teach you how to take everything you've done so far and create something that is so valuable, so priceless that people just can't say no to it and they get the results they want. So without further ado, here's Amanda.
